b95f.summary: MemStore.get() scans via index then resolves backend — cross-group queries fan out through _FanoutBackend
b95f.content:
## Observation

MemStore.get() resolves nodes through the index and cross-group queries fan out through _FanoutBackend. This is acceptable for correctness but leaves a performance and architecture question about how retrieval should scale as the store grows.

## Why It Matters

The current implementation is simple and keeps group boundaries explicit, but repeated fanout across backends can become a cost center for query-heavy flows, especially when export, verify, and agent context generation touch many groups.

## Current Position

This is tracked as a low-severity design issue rather than an immediate bug. Any optimization should preserve correctness, backend abstraction, and the existing query semantics before chasing raw speed.
